---
name: Feature request / new example
about: Propose a new example pipeline, new module, or enhancement to an existing one
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## What are you proposing?

Describe the new example, module, or enhancement concisely.

## Why does it belong here?

This repo's scope is:
- Efficient VLM fine-tuning and inference (adaptation, quantization, serving)
- Production MLOps for vision/VLM (drift detection, monitoring, active learning)
- Robustness and safety layers for multimodal systems
- Bridges from recent research (2025–2026 papers) to adoptable production code

Does the proposal fit one of these? If so, which? If not, is there a strong case for expanding scope?

## Technique / paper reference

If this is based on a specific technique or paper, cite it here. This repo explicitly links every technique to its source — new additions should follow the same convention.

## What would success look like?

What headline metric or before/after table should the new example produce? What's the CPU fallback behavior?

## Willingness to implement

- [ ] I can implement this and submit a PR
- [ ] I can help review a PR
- [ ] I'm just suggesting — happy for someone else to pick it up
